name: Ricotta-Stuffed Zucchini Flowers
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Toasted almonds or pine nuts (finely chopped)
20 medium Zucchini flowers (rinsed in cold water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together all ingredients except butter and flowers.
2. With filling at room temperature, carefully stuff the zucchini flowers using a pastry tube.
3. Drizzle melted butter over the stuffed flowers.
4. Cook in microwave on medium power for 3 minutes, or bake at 350°F in a regular oven for about 15 minutes.
5. Be careful not to let the filling ooze out of the flowers.
6. Garnish with nasturtiums stuffed with extra filling.
